alert_message: Topic is showing massive momentum. The shift from static LLMs to autonomous Agents is underway.
human_summary: The field is moving beyond simple chat. Developers are flocking to frameworks like AutoGen and CrewAI to build systems that can 'plan' and 'act' autonomously. Academic research confirms that Multi-Agent collaboration significantly outperforms single-model performance.
